heading: The Warning Signal
info: A universal mathematical law of failure.
text: In 2021, researchers found exactly one universal warning signal that appears before every community collapse. It's called Critical Slowing Down.

heading: 79 Communities
info: Signal present in 100% of collapsed systems studied.
text: By analyzing 79 different ecosystems, from shallow lakes to complex forests, a measurable mathematical flicker appeared every single time.

heading: Variance Spike
info: Recovery time increases as the tipping point nears.
text: As the basin of attraction shallows, variance and autocorrelation rise. The system starts taking longer to bounce back from small disturbances.

heading: Amazon Tipping Point
info: Permanent flip from rainforest to savanna.
text: With the Amazon forest nearing a 25% deforestation threshold, this signal is already visible. If we cross it, the rainforest flips permanently into savanna.
